text: 3g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

the upsides first: can replace much worse drinks because that substitution value matters more than raw micronutrients here. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. can still earn points as a better swap because the category should reward harm reduction when it is real.

on the weaker side: easy to overpay for the health halo because the benefits are usually less magical than the branding suggests. not a whole-food nutrition star because most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile. easy to oversell beyond what the numbers support because misc items often attract exaggerated narratives.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
